user_intent_cn: 根修 ingress：Grok 续跑包带 anchor_task_id + continue_same_task 时必须 signal 已有 workflow，禁止 spawn 新 owner；消灭 BLOCKED_TEMPORAL_LIVE_ROUTE_REQUIRED 误杀。
root_cause_cn: call_codex_a_mature_intent_entry 永远生成新 task_id 并 call_codexa_temporal_task_owner（无 --live-temporal），忽略 anchor/routing_verb。tests/test_ingress_result_recovery.py 已定义 signal_continue_same_task_workflow 行为，但生产代码未实现。

must_implement.summary_cn: 在 runtime/ingress/clean_ingress.py 实现 signal_continue_same_task_workflow(task_id, payload, message)：读 current_task_owner、worker_assignment，temporal workflow signal continue_same_task，写 state/continue_same_task_signal/tasks/{task_id}.json
call_codex_a_mature_intent_entry 入口：若 anchor_task_id 非空且 routing_verb 归一化为 continue_same_task → 走 signal 分支；task_id=anchor_task_id；跳过 call_codexa_temporal_task_owner；可选跳过 app-server dialog（与测试一致）
仅真新 owner 路径 call_codexa_temporal_task_owner 时追加 --live-temporal；续跑路径永不调用
action_write_job 写入 visible_delivered/ingress_accepted/temporal_bound/worker_dispatched 四段真相；BLOCKED 时 named_blocker 必须 surfaced

acceptance_machine: Grok POST with anchor_task_id=5d33 routing_verb=continue_same_task → status not BLOCKED_TEMPORAL_LIVE_ROUTE_REQUIRED
task_id in result equals anchor_task_id not new uuid
backend_codex_worker_dispatch true or workflow dispatches worker after signal
sync D:\XINAO_CLEAN_RUNTIME\ingress\clean_ingress.py from repo and restart ingress
forbidden: spawn new owner when anchor_task_id present and spawn_new_owner_allowed=false
hand-roll in A TUI without WORKER_ASSIGNMENT
parallel_work: Monitor cockpit handoff 2026-06-28_xinao_codex_monitor_cockpit.v1.json may continue after this P0 unblocks delivery
